description: Hand-curated expectations for the Quantum Technologies Q3 planning meeting. Used by metrics.py and the LLM-as-judge evaluator. Values here are not exact outputs but constraints the synthesis must satisfy.

required_topics.rationale: Theme 1 of the meeting was about firmware deployment failures during peak maintenance windows. This must be picked up.
Theme 2 was about production order status showing stale data in the PartnerPortal.
Theme 3 was about NCR/CAPA case intake channel split across PartnerPortal and QualityHub.
Theme 4 was about supplier delivery confirmation confusion.

forbidden_topics.rationale: Explicitly declined in the meeting (`Things we explicitly said NO to`) — owned by hardware team.

expected_duplicates.rationale: QT-412 is the in-progress production order status badge fix — clearly the same problem space.
QT-389 is the supplier delivery confirmation confusion ticket — same theme.

expected_constraint_conflicts.rationale: Automatic rollback of security-critical firmware updates is FORBIDDEN without a validated rollback image under IEC 62443 (Section 3). Any story proposing this should be flagged.
